name: お名前バトル
developer: 株式会社スタジオトリガー
publisher: 株式会社スタジオトリガー
short_description: ”Onamae Battle” is an easy-to-play game in which you simply enter your favorite ‘Onamae’ and the game will automatically battle for you! The name automatically determines the battle power, so it is easy to enjoy regardless of age or gender. You can also add your favorite images to the battle screen!
detailed_description:
Overview

”Onamae Battle” is an auto-battle simulator that can be played simply by entering a name.

Based on the “Onamae” entered by the user, the strength and specialties are automatically set and the battle begins. You will not know what kind of battle the “Onamae” will fight until you try to battle with it.

You will never know what kind of battles the “Onamae” will have until you try to battle with it!

Specifications

Up to 32 “Onamaes” can battle in a league battle per battle.

The game was developed as a simple party game like a BINGO game to determine the ranking.

How to enjoy

Users can set the image that will be displayed along with the “Onamae” when playing.

You can set your favorite pet's “Onamae” and photo to battle, or your family member, friend, or colleague's “Onamae” and photo to battle, and have a lot of fun while watching the screen!

Who will win the first place! Let's wait for the result announcement with a sense of excitement!

Distribution Guidelines for Playing Game Content

You can distribute without permission regardless of whether you are an individual or a corporation, for-profit or non-profit.

Monetization is only possible when using the features provided by the Monetization Program System.

We are not responsible for any damage caused by distributing videos of this game.

※The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.※
